reasoning: With only 5 days remaining until the resolution date (October 31, 2025), there is no evidence indicating that Moonshot AI currently occupies the #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena (LMSYS) Leaderboard. Given the intense competition from the likes of OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic—and the massive amount of crowdsourced battles needed to establish the top Arena score—Moonshot's probability of overtaking them to secure the highest overall score by October 31 is near zero. I am forecasting the lowest probability allowed.
